name: AI Session Summarizer
description: AI Session Summarizer adds on-demand, AI-generated 2-3 sentence digests to every Claude Code session in Swob. Instead of relying on raw firstUserMessage, it reads key turns and produces a cached summary: what was built, what decisions were made, and the outcome. Summaries are generated lazily, cached in Library metadata, and never block the UI. Gracefully degrades when ANTHROPIC_API_KEY is absent.
